title: Portable Context Control Plane — SelectorSummary
description: Internal object schema for the selectorSummary record produced at the end of the selector fan-out phase. Contains required integer count fields plus a deterministic narrative string. The narrative is generated from a fixed template using count values only — no model generation. Canonical owner: docs/06 §3.6.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-3 (Batch C creation). No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. Canonical: docs/06 §3.6; docs/12 §4.5. Quarantine events are NOT counted here — registry-phase only.

totalEvaluated.description: Total number of components evaluated across all selector fan-out invocations. This is the total candidate set size. Quarantine events are not counted here — they are registry-phase events. Canonical: docs/06 §3.6.

decidedInclude.description: Count of components for which at least one selector produced action: include (any path). Canonical: docs/06 §3.6.

decidedOmit.description: Count of components for which at least one selector produced action: omit (Path A or Path B only). Does NOT include runtime_unavailable defer decisions — those are counted in runtimeUnavailableDefer. Canonical: docs/06 §3.6.

decidedDefer.description: Total count of components for which any selector produced action: defer (sum of defaultDefer and runtimeUnavailableDefer). Canonical: docs/06 §3.6.

defaultDefer.description: Count of components deferred via path: default_defer (defaultAction: defer matched). These are excluded from the current plan turn but not omitted. No token savings claim. Canonical: docs/06 §3.6; docs/06 §8 Step 10.

runtimeUnavailableDefer.description: Count of components deferred via path: runtime_unavailable (confirmed-unavailable type: tool). These are NOT counted as omissions. NOT counted as token savings. Must be filterable from total defer by path. Canonical: docs/06 §3.6; docs/06 §8 Step 2 / §14.3.

failOpenInclude.description: Count of components that received action: include via path: fail_open (including injection-gate-converted omit decisions and any other fail-open outcome). Canonical: docs/06 §3.6.

conflictsIdentified.description: Count of components that received decisions from more than one selector, or whose single decision carried path: conflict_include. These components must pass through Conflict Resolution. Canonical: docs/06 §3.6.

unknownReferences.description: Count of components that received action: reference_unknown — IDs referenced during selector evaluation that were not found in componentsById. Distinct from active_id_unknown (which is for active ID list validation at the core boundary). Canonical: docs/06 §3.6.

narrative.description: Deterministic template-based narrative for summary.md output. Generated from the count fields using the fixed template defined in docs/06 §3.6. No model generation is permitted — the narrative must match the template output exactly for given count values. Harness must assert narrative matches computed template; any deviation is a harness failure. Canonical: docs/06 §3.6; docs/12 §7.18.
